objective: Restore successful request processing after a partial deployment regression.
incident_summary: Some requests started failing after a tokenizer-related deployment.
logs:
INFO: Processing inference batch.
WARN: Subword lookup failed for 3 tokens.
ERROR: Tokenizer version mismatch on request payload. Expected format for model v2.1.0, got unparseable payload from tokenizer v3.0.0-rc1.
INFO: Processing inference batch.
recent_deploy: Rolled out tokenizer package v3.0.0-rc1 to support new client features. Model version was not updated.
